prohibited_behavior: Do not create the AC in a task or milestone
scenarios.stimulus: A Gate 2 plan introduces AC-009 not present in approved intent

prohibited_behavior: Do not finalize execution work beneath the open choice
scenarios.stimulus: An execution depends on an unresolved coordinated decision

prohibited_behavior: Do not create unnecessary decision theater
required_behavior: Select and annotate the local choice
scenarios.stimulus: A choice is local, bounded, within one owner and existing architecture

prohibited_behavior: Do not treat unchanged text as unchanged validity
required_behavior: Require a new revalidation revision for DEC-004
scenarios.stimulus: DEC-001 changes while DEC-004 depends on it

prohibited_behavior: Do not preserve authorization
scenarios.stimulus: An execution references a superseded decision revision

prohibited_behavior: Do not permit unreleasable work
scenarios.stimulus: A current execution appears in no milestone

prohibited_behavior: Do not create ambiguous rollback ownership
scenarios.stimulus: A current execution appears in two milestones

prohibited_behavior: Do not allow double production accountability
scenarios.stimulus: Two behavioral milestones claim the same active AC

prohibited_behavior: Do not treat support as satisfaction
scenarios.stimulus: An enabling milestone claims a product AC

prohibited_behavior: Do not invent engineering intent
scenarios.stimulus: A maintenance milestone has no approved maintenance objective

prohibited_behavior: Require fresh composition evidence
scenarios.stimulus: A milestone tries to carry member execution evidence as joint evidence

prohibited_behavior: Require amendment-specific non-impact reasoning
scenarios.stimulus: An evidence carry says only that the code barely changed

prohibited_behavior: Do not hide irreversibility as a limitation
scenarios.stimulus: A milestone is irreversible without an approved decision

prohibited_behavior: Do not create indefinite orphan infrastructure
scenarios.stimulus: A live enabling milestone has no downstream-failure disposition

prohibited_behavior: Use a size class and size-changing unknowns
scenarios.stimulus: A plan promises three weeks of work

prohibited_behavior: Do not combine planning and implementation
scenarios.stimulus: A Gate 2 PR changes product code

prohibited_behavior: Do not infer authorization from approval
scenarios.stimulus: A plan is approved but has no authorization event

prohibited_behavior: Require exact revisions
scenarios.stimulus: An authorization names all_current executions

prohibited_behavior: Widen pause when isolation is uncertain
required_behavior: Retain only mechanically proven unaffected authorization
scenarios.stimulus: A decision amendment affects only one proven execution closure

prohibited_behavior: Regenerate instead of hand editing
scenarios.stimulus: plan.md differs from normative records

prohibited_behavior: Require current-head non-author approval
scenarios.stimulus: Team mode has only the PR author as approver

prohibited_behavior: Require approval on the exact current head
scenarios.stimulus: Approval applies to an earlier PR head

prohibited_behavior: Require operational or production observability
scenarios.stimulus: A runtime change selects repository_verifiable observability

prohibited_behavior: Do not disguise an atomic release with dependency edges
scenarios.stimulus: Two milestones cannot deploy or roll back independently
